boundaries.summary: Phase 17 observability tooling reads operational snapshots and emits deterministic diagnostics; it does not modify runtime enforcement, billing, ledger storage, or database schemas.

evidence_flow_signals.summary: P95 latency between evidence emission and acknowledged ingest, observed externally; not a hosted verdict guarantee.
Ratio of accepted evidence submissions vs total submissions over the observation window, used to surface ingest regressions.
Distribution of VALID, INVALID, and BLOCKED verdicts emitted by the audit service during the observation window.

non_goals: Phase 17 does not introduce billing telemetry, ledger telemetry, or schema migrations.
Phase 17 does not redefine VALID / INVALID / BLOCKED verdict semantics or runtime enforcement.
Operational snapshots are not legal certifications and must not be treated as conformity statements.

operational_probes.description: Schema and reference path validation for this manifest.
operational_probes.name: validate_observability_manifest

operational_probes.description: Schema validation for a single operational snapshot payload.
operational_probes.name: validate_operational_snapshot

operational_probes.description: Deterministic health, readiness, evidence, and diagnostics scoring with risk_level and findings.
operational_probes.name: operational_health_score

operational_probes.description: Aggregated observability diagnostics across manifest, snapshot, Makefile wiring, and documentation paths.
operational_probes.name: observability_check

operational_probes.description: Deterministic Markdown operational intelligence report assembled from a single snapshot.
operational_probes.name: generate_operational_intelligence_report

readiness_signals.summary: Boolean derived from GET /ready against the hosted or self-hosted audit service; treated as a non-authoritative liveness hint.
Indicates whether the operator-controlled migration runner reports a consistent state without partial application warnings.
Whether the configured policy pack manifest loaded without surfaced validation errors during the snapshot window.

runtime_health_signals.summary: Observed uptime of the audit service over the snapshot window expressed in whole minutes; informational only.
Operator-visible error rate across audit ingest, summary, and export endpoints expressed as an integer percentage.
Count of currently open operational incidents tracked outside GovAI; included only for risk weighting.

snapshot_schema.summary: Operational snapshots are JSON objects describing a deterministic point-in-time view of audit service runtime, readiness, evidence flow, and diagnostic checks for offline scoring; they are not ledger entries.

summary: Observability manifest for GovAI Phase 17: machine-readable index of runtime health, readiness, evidence-flow, diagnostics, and operational-intelligence tooling. Operators use it to compute deterministic scores and generate diagnostic reports without changing runtime enforcement, billing, ledger, or schema semantics.
